title: Big Globe - Hephaestus (Tinker's Construct) Compatibility Pack
description: Compatibility pack between Hephaestus (Tinker's Construct) and Big Globe.
body:
**At the time I made this, I had no access to the Big Globe discord server. There is probably a better, updated datapack on there.**

This pack adds Tinker's Constructs's geodes, sky islands, and cobalt ore to a Big Globe world.

This was made with [Hephaestus](https://modrinth.com/mod/hephaestus) in mind, but should theoretically work with any other Tinker's Construct fork, assuming they keep the same tags/structures.

[Tinker's Construct](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tinkers-construct)
